plugins.name: REVA Teaching & Learning Agent Pack
plugins.description: TRACK Educator Plugin: Coordinates syllabus design, session planning, content generation, and course integrity audits.

plugins.name: SrujanaShodha — Faculty Research Advisor
plugins.description: SrujanaShodha (ಸೃಜನ ಶೋಧ — Creative Discovery) is REVA University's personal research advisory AI. Drives faculty research careers through competency profiling (Zone A/B/C), opportunity identification, interdisciplinary collaboration design, funding navigation (30+ schemes: DST/DBT/UGC/SERB/CSR/International), full research lifecycle coaching, work product review (Strength→Gap→Next Move), journal targeting, SDG impact auditing, and personal brand building. AcademicianClaw-style orchestrated agents with persistent memory. Skill architecture adapted from google-deepmind/science-skills (Apache 2.0). Standalone — install independently without other REVA plugins.

plugins.name: REVA Academic Administration Agent Pack
plugins.description: TRACK Administrator Plugin: Powers orchestrations, curriculum revisions, syllabus publications, attainment evaluations, and regulatory compliance audits.

plugins.name: REVA Consulting & Product Development Agent Pack
plugins.description: TRACK Consultant/Innovator Plugin: Manages experiential learning, industry connect MOUs, consulting engagement briefs, and patent IP claim drafts.

plugins.name: REVA Kaizen & Wellbeing Agent Pack
plugins.description: TRACK Self-Improver Plugin: Powering self-reflection coaching, habit and commitment trackers, FDP integrations, GPS planning, and wellbeing navigations.

plugins.name: REVA Law Student Study Companion
plugins.description: Socratic drilling, case briefing, IRAC grading, AIBE prep (first-class), moot court simulation, and exam forecasting for REVA Law School students (BA LLB, BBA LLB, LLM, PhD). Learning mode only — never writes the answer for you. Standalone plugin — install independently without other REVA plugins.

plugins.name: AcademicianClaw — Faculty Personal Intelligence
plugins.description: OpenClaw v2 personal agentic system for faculty: orchestrated specialists for writing, research, task management, reflection, habit tracking, learning coaching, and academic leadership. Each faculty member maintains their own local memory/ (gitignored). Standalone — install independently.

skills.name: Course Buddy Builder
skills.description: Faculty tool: generates an Obsidian wiki, Jupyter workbook, and Socratic tutor skill.md from a filled course descriptor. Supports Build, Refresh, and Audit modes. Free-tier compatible (NotebookLM optional). Internal use only — never student-facing.
